summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Enterprise Initiative Control Tower. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI mostly working with one React SelectItem component issue preventing All Initiatives navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: React error: SelectItem must have a value prop that is not an empty string
ui_bugs.impact: Prevents All Initiatives page from loading properly
ui_bugs.error_details: SelectItem component receiving empty string value causing React runtime error

integration_issues.issue: Page fails to load due to SelectItem React error

passed_tests: Dashboard loading and displaying stats correctly
Seed data endpoint functioning (8 initiatives, 2 Code Red)
Code Red dashboard navigation and display
Risk Heatmap navigation and 9x3 matrix display
Initiative detail view loading and navigation
Create initiative form access and controls
User profile menu and logout functionality
Professional Vertiv branding and orange theme (#FE5B1B)
All backend API endpoints (27/27 tests passed)

success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Core flows working, one component error blocking All Initiatives page

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix React SelectItem component error: Ensure all SelectItem components have non-empty string values. The error occurs in dropdown/filter components and prevents the All Initiatives page from loading. This is likely in InitiativesList.jsx filter dropdowns where empty string values are being passed to SelectItem components.
